n: Book 11, Chapter 9: The Diary of Sara Oakheart

steps.t: Delossad is located south-east of Echad Candelleth, in Tâl Bruinen. Candelleth is sure that she has solved the riddle posed by the diary of Sara Oakhe…
Candelleth is at her camp in Tâl Bruinen. You have recovered a box of broken keys from beneath a bush at the ruins of Delossad, known as Sithad in day…
The jeweller Merilos is at the Spire of Meeting in Rivendell. You have found a box full of broken keys buried sometime in the past at Delossad by Sara…
